answers: Salary negotiation: research market rate (Glassdoor, Levels.fyi), let them make first offer, and always negotiate — most expect it.
Tips: focus on total compensation (not just salary), use data to support your ask, and practice your response.
Strategy: 'Based on my research and experience, I was expecting X-Y range. Can we discuss how to get there?'
Beton niye kotha: market rate janho, nijer value bujho, data diye kotha bolo, ar confident thako.
